validation.method: Inline by orchestrator — bug fix with single-line attribute change; DISTILL wrote RED test with exact required value; DESIGN/DISCUSS committed to PortfolioRead behaviour (rbac-enhancements WD-12 / DD-08)

phases.name: Flip GetByPortfolio RBAC guard
phases.description: Change RbacGuardRequirement.PortfolioWrite to PortfolioRead on DeliveriesController.GetByPortfolio so portfolio-read users can fetch the delivery list. Write endpoints (Create/Update/Delete) keep PortfolioWrite.

steps.name: Flip GetByPortfolio RbacGuardRequirement
steps.criteria: DeliveriesController.GetByPortfolio is decorated [RbacGuard(RbacGuardRequirement.PortfolioRead, ScopeIdRouteKey = "portfolioId")]; renamed unit test GetByPortfolio_HasPortfolioReadRbacGuardAttribute passes; CreateDelivery / UpdateDelivery / DeleteDelivery guards unchanged; new tests UpdateDelivery_WithoutPortfolioWrite_ReturnsForbidden and DeleteDelivery_WithoutPortfolioWrite_ReturnsForbidden pass; full DeliveriesControllerTest suite green.
steps.scenario_name: GetByPortfolio has PortfolioRead RbacGuard attribute; write endpoints retain PortfolioWrite
steps.implementation_notes: Single-line attribute requirement change on line 27 of DeliveriesController.cs: replace RbacGuardRequirement.PortfolioWrite with RbacGuardRequirement.PortfolioRead. Do NOT touch lines 36 (CreateDelivery), 95+ (UpdateDelivery in-method guard at line 118), or 163+ (DeleteDelivery in-method guard at line 169) — write endpoints must keep PortfolioWrite. The RED test asserting PortfolioRead already exists at DeliveriesControllerTest.cs:266. Verify with `dotnet test` on the test project.
